lyrics.text: I will run, I will climb, I will soar
lyrics.translation: 我将奔跑，我将攀爬，我将飞翔

lyrics.text: I’m undefeated
lyrics.translation: 永不言败

lyrics.text: Jumping out of my skin, pull the chord
lyrics.translation: 脱离身体的桎梏，拉动琴弦

lyrics.text: Yeah I believe it
lyrics.translation: 哦，我相信。

lyrics.text: The past, is everything we were don’t make us who we are
lyrics.translation: 往昔，逝去的光阴不会决定现在

lyrics.text: So I’ll dream, until I make it real, and all I see is stars
lyrics.translation: 所以我们梦想，直到变成真，看到满天星光

lyrics.text: It's not until you fall that you fly
lyrics.translation: 经历跌倒，才能飞翔

lyrics.text: When your dreams come alive you’re unstoppable
lyrics.translation: 当你的梦想成真，你是不可阻挡

lyrics.text: Take a shot, chase the sun, find the beautiful
lyrics.translation: 挥着翅膀，追逐太阳，寻找美丽

lyrics.text: We will glow in the dark turning dust to gold
lyrics.translation: 在黑暗中闪耀点石成金

lyrics.text: And we’ll dream it possible possible And we'll dream it possible
lyrics.translation: 我们会梦想成真，有可能的，我们会梦想成真

lyrics.text: I will chase, I will reach, I will fly
lyrics.translation: 我将追逐，我将到达，我将飞翔

lyrics.text: Until I’m breaking, until I’m breaking
lyrics.translation: 直到我摧毁，直到我打破

lyrics.text: Out of my cage, like a bird in the night
lyrics.translation: 囚禁我的牢笼，像在黑夜里自由的鸟儿

lyrics.text: I know I’m changing, I know I’m changing
lyrics.translation: 我知道我在变化，在蜕变

lyrics.text: In, into something big, better than before
lyrics.translation: 变成无比强大，从未有过

lyrics.text: And if it takes, takes a thousand lives
lyrics.translation: 如果需要牺牲，需要无数的生命

lyrics.text: Then it’s worth fighting for
lyrics.translation: 那值得去奋斗

lyrics.text: It's not until you fall that you fly
lyrics.translation: 经历跌倒，才能飞翔

lyrics.text: When your dreams come alive you’re unstoppable
lyrics.translation: 当你的梦想成真，你是不可阻挡

lyrics.text: Take a shot, chase the sun, find the beautiful
lyrics.translation: 挥着翅膀，追逐太阳，寻找美丽

lyrics.text: We will glow in the dark turning dust to gold
lyrics.translation: 在黑暗中闪耀点石成金

lyrics.text: And we’ll dream it possible it possible
lyrics.translation: 我们会梦想成真

lyrics.text: From the bottom to the top
lyrics.translation: 从低谷到巅峰

lyrics.text: We’re sparking wild fires
lyrics.translation: 我们正在迸发野火

lyrics.text: Never quit and never stop
lyrics.translation: 永不放弃，永不停止

lyrics.text: The rest of our lives
lyrics.translation: 点燃未来

lyrics.text: From the bottom to the top
lyrics.translation: 从山谷到巅峰

lyrics.text: We’re sparking wild fires
lyrics.translation: 我们正在迸发野火

lyrics.text: Never quit and never stop
lyrics.translation: 永不放弃，永不停止

lyrics.text: We will glow in the dark turning dust to gold
